title: Shoppy Dashboard
tagline: Responsive e-commerce admin dashboard built for operational visibility and day-to-day store management.
impact: Packaged multiple admin workflows into one customizable interface.
summary: Shoppy is an e-commerce admin dashboard focused on helping teams manage orders, customers, employees, content, and reporting from a single interface.
challenge: Admin tools often become cluttered quickly when they try to handle analytics, scheduling, content editing, and data management in one place.
solution: I built a responsive dashboard that keeps the information architecture clean while still supporting tables, charts, calendar workflows, kanban tracking, editing tools, and theming.

title: Tech Haven E-Commerce
tagline: Full-stack e-commerce platform with storefront, CMS-backed product management, and Stripe checkout.
impact: Combined storefront, payments, content management, and order flows into one MERN application.
summary: Tech Haven is a full-stack commerce platform built with the MERN stack, Payload CMS, and Stripe integration. It supports both a customer storefront and an admin-oriented content and product workflow.
challenge: An e-commerce product has to balance customer experience, payment reliability, product management, SEO, media handling, and authentication without feeling fragmented.
solution: I used a full-stack architecture with CMS-driven product control, secure authentication, persistent shopping flows, and Stripe checkout to create a cohesive commerce experience.

title: Snippet Assistant
tagline: Chrome extension for creating, organizing, and inserting reusable snippets directly from the browser.
impact: Built as a practical workflow tool to reduce repetitive copy-paste work for day-to-day communication.
summary: Snippet Assistant is a browser extension developed as a personal challenge to learn Vue 3, Vite, and TypeScript while solving a real productivity problem.
challenge: Manual snippet handling becomes slow and error-prone when teams reuse the same messages, templates, or fragments across repetitive workflows.
solution: I designed the extension around quick creation, editing, folder organization, breadcrumb navigation, and fast insertion so snippets stay usable in real work instead of turning into clutter.
